portfolio.title: Healthcare Management System
portfolio.description: Full-suite healthcare ERP covering patient registration, appointment scheduling, diagnosis records, billing, pharmacy inventory, and insurance claim management — all tightly integrated with Odoo's accounting module.

portfolio.title: Dental Clinic Management
portfolio.description: Custom Odoo module for dental practices featuring patient tooth charts, treatment planning, appointment slots, invoice generation per treatment, and a waiting-room dashboard built with OWL components.

portfolio.title: Jewellery Management System
portfolio.description: Specialised inventory and POS extension for jewellery retail tracking gold weight, purity karat, making charges, and live gold rate integration. Includes custom product variant handling and RFID tag support.

portfolio.title: Construction Project Management
portfolio.description: Project ERP for construction companies covering site budgeting, material requisition, subcontractor billing, BOQ (bill of quantities) management, progress milestones, and Gantt-based project timelines.

portfolio.title: WhatsApp Business Integration
portfolio.description: WhatsApp Cloud API integration with Odoo for sending automated order confirmations, invoice links, delivery notifications, and appointment reminders directly to customers. Includes message template management and delivery status tracking.

portfolio.title: Shopify ↔ Odoo Integration
portfolio.description: Bidirectional sync bridge between Shopify storefront and Odoo backend. Handles real-time product catalog sync, stock level updates, order import with tax mapping, and automated invoice + delivery order creation.

portfolio.title: Beauty Clinic Management
portfolio.description: Full clinic management system for beauty and aesthetics centers. Covers service package management, therapist scheduling, session tracking, product inventory, loyalty points, and customer before/after image records.

portfolio.title: Veterinary Management System
portfolio.description: End-to-end veterinary ERP covering animal patient profiles, vet appointment scheduling, vaccination records, prescription printing, boarding management, and automated reminders via SMS.

portfolio.title: Fleet Management System
portfolio.description: Extended Odoo Fleet module with GPS tracker integration, automated service reminders, fuel log management, driver assignment workflows, traffic fine tracking, and insurance renewal alerts.

portfolio.title: WooCommerce ↔ Odoo Integration
portfolio.description: Seamless WooCommerce to Odoo connector synchronising products, inventory, customer data, and orders. Includes configurable field mapping, error-retry queues, and a live sync dashboard for operations teams.

portfolio.title: Catering Management System
portfolio.description: Event catering ERP covering menu planning, client quotation, kitchen production scheduling, ingredient procurement, event crew assignment, and post-event invoicing with per-head cost breakdowns.

portfolio.title: Co-working Space Management
portfolio.description: Complete co-working space platform covering hot desk and private office bookings, membership plans, meeting room reservations, access control integration, monthly billing, and utilisation analytics dashboards.

portfolio.title: Co-living Management System
portfolio.description: Property management ERP tailored for co-living businesses. Handles tenant onboarding, room allocation, rent collection, utility billing, maintenance requests, lease renewals, and vacancy reporting.

portfolio.title: Hospital Management System
portfolio.description: Large-scale hospital ERP integrating in-patient and out-patient management, ward bed allocation, lab test ordering, nursing workflows, theatre scheduling, discharge summaries, and insurance pre-authorisation.

portfolio.title: Courier & Delivery Management
portfolio.description: Courier logistics platform covering shipment booking, waybill generation, route optimisation, last-mile delivery tracking, COD reconciliation, and automated SMS/WhatsApp notifications to senders and recipients.

portfolio.title: University Management System
portfolio.description: Comprehensive higher-education ERP covering student admissions, course enrolment, timetable scheduling, exam management, grade publishing, fee collection, library management, and academic reporting.

portfolio.title: School Management System
portfolio.description: K-12 school ERP handling student enrollment, class scheduling, attendance, teacher payroll, fee invoicing, parent portal, exam results, and bus route management — all integrated in a single Odoo instance.

portfolio.title: Transport Management System
portfolio.description: End-to-end transport ERP managing freight bookings, vehicle dispatch, trip planning, driver management, fuel consumption tracking, real-time GPS integration, customs documentation, and automated billing.

services.title: Odoo Custom Development
services.description: Creating custom models, fields, wizards, security groups, and automated workflows. Fully compliant with Odoo's OOP structure and migration guidelines.

services.title: API & System Integration
services.description: Building bridges between Odoo and external systems like payment gateways, biometric devices, WooCommerce, Shopify, and shipping carriers.

services.title: OWL Frontend Customization
services.description: Extending Odoo's web client, POS, or website front-end using the OWL framework. Building reactive widgets, custom components, and fast interfaces.

services.title: Performance Tuning & DevOps
services.description: Database profiling, raw query optimization, index tuning, backup configuration, and deploying Odoo clusters via Docker and Nginx on AWS/Odoo.sh.
